title: SCP-1057, Absence of Shark
description: An invisible shark lurking beneath the water’s surface.
body:
Absence of Shark adds a terrifying new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-1057, also known as Absence of Shark.


SCP-1057 behaves like a shark but is almost entirely invisible and is only be found in bodies of water, .SCP-1057 is fast, deadly, and highly aggressive toward players, villagers, Squids and other mobs. Despite its unseen nature, its presence can be revealed temporarily by using a special Fluorescent Dye.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-1057 spawn?

SCP-1057 can spawn in bodies of water. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-1057

</details>



![SCP-1057](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce0f0762f64047ce55717e16084d3a3fb537879c.png)

SCP-1057 appears as a near-invisible shark that spawns only in water. It is highly aggressive, swimming at high speed and dealing severe damage to its targets. Players attacked by SCP-1057 while being under 15 hearts will suffer a bleeding effect. The creature also attacks villagers, squids, glow squids, turtles and dolphins. SCP-1057 also despawns instantly if removed from water. Using a Fluorescent Dye on SCP-1057 gives it a red-orange texture for one minute. The Fluorescent Dye is craftable with 1 glow inc sac, 1 red dye and 1 orange dye. 

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
